text:
- Update to 2.2.0
- Add SF mirror
- Mark MAKE_JOBS_SAFE
- Add WITHOUT_NLS support
- Unfortunately, no longer builds on 6.x :(

The new required dependency (graphics/quesoglc) was just committed.

Port maintainer (alepulver@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
